questions.question: Explain Struct Attributes C and its primary use case in C Programming.
questions.answer: Struct Attributes C provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with Struct Attributes C?

questions.question: How does the C Programming runtime optimize Struct Attributes C under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
